result.stdout:
.NET Core global tool to list and remove SDKs and runtimes tarballs installed with dotnet-install scripts

Usage: dotnet-tarball-cleanup [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  runtimes      Manage installed runtimes
  sdks          Manage installed Sdks

Run 'dotnet-tarball-cleanup [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
.NET Core global tool to list and remove SDKs and runtimes tarballs installed with dotnet-install scripts

Usage: dotnet-tarball-cleanup [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  runtimes      Manage installed runtimes
  sdks          Manage installed Sdks

Run 'dotnet-tarball-cleanup [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Manage installed runtimes

Usage: dotnet-tarball-cleanup runtimes [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  list          List installed Dotnet Runtimes
  remove        Remove target Dotnet runtime

Run 'runtimes [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
List installed Dotnet Runtimes

Usage: dotnet-tarball-cleanup runtimes list [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

result.stdout:
Remove target Dotnet runtime

Usage: dotnet-tarball-cleanup runtimes remove [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information
  -v|--version <VERSION>  Runtime version to be removed
  -a|--all                Removes all installed runtimes
  -r|--regex <REGEX>      Removes installed runtimes matching regex

commands.payload:

Usage: dotnet-tarball-cleanup runtimes remove [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information
  -v|--version <VERSION>  Runtime version to be removed
  -a|--all                Removes all installed runtimes
  -r|--regex <REGEX>      Removes installed runtimes matching regex
